title: Profile 4/6
description: You influence through relationship and, eventually, through earned authority. Build your network deliberately. After your first Saturn return, your role model quality becomes unmistakable.
learningGoal: The viewer understands, in plain daily-life terms, what "4/6" means for them and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: You influence through relationship and, eventually, through earned authority.
After your first Saturn return, your role model quality becomes unmistakable.
forbiddenClaims: one profile is more gifted than another
the trial-and-error lines mean you are failing

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Profile 4/6 — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Profile 4/6 — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Profile 4/6 — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Profile 4/6 — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You influence through relationship and, eventually, through earned authority. Build your network deliberately. After your first Saturn return, your role model quality becomes unmistakable.
